body.value: 藩制一覽表第九（山口）
藩制一覧表 第九冊（山口）— 版面右端の柱（走り頭）

Running page-header in the right margin: Domain Survey Table, ninth fascicle (Yamaguchi / Choshu). The nine 藩制一覧表 fascicles are numbered registers, not data themes; fascicles 8-9 are the officials + military register. Header text occupies only y~1262-1820; provenance, not domain data.
page header 藩制一覧表第九（山口）
二百八十四
二百八十四（284）
Printed page number 284 in the bottom margin of the fascicle. Marginal printed folio number, not data. (Proposer had 384; the leading numeral is 二, two strokes, not 三.)
printed page number 三百八十四
兵隊
兵隊（へいたい）— 陸軍の部の見出し

Troops -- land-forces heading. Sits to the RIGHT (higher x) of the ○山口藩 boundary marker, so by the HI fascicle-8/9 right-of-marker rule it is the military OVERFLOW of the PRECEDING (smaller) domain, NOT Choshu's. Choshu's own troops print on the facing page lower_p204_left.
PREV-domain 兵隊 (military overflow)
銃隊 八拾人
銃隊（じゅうたい）八十人

Gun corps -- 80 men. To the RIGHT of the ○山口藩 marker, so it belongs to the PRECEDING domain (its military overflow), not to Choshu. The modest figure (80) fits a small preceding domain rather than Choshu.
PREV-domain 銃隊 八拾人 (military overflow)
○山口藩
○山口藩（やまぐちはん＝長州藩）

Domain-boundary marker ○山口藩 (Yamaguchi = Choshu domain). Everything to the LEFT of this ○ (governor and councillor roster) is Choshu's; everything to its RIGHT (兵隊 / 銃隊八拾人) belongs to the preceding domain.
○山口藩 domain-boundary marker
知事 一人
知事（ちじ）一人
Governor (chiji) -- 1 person. The domain-governor heading and its count; the appointee is named below.
Chōshū 知事 (count)
毛利元雄
毛利元雄（もうり もとお）— 一般に毛利元徳（もとのり）として知られる長州藩知事。版面の表記は『雄』

Governor's name as printed: Mori Motoo (毛利元雄), the Choshu domain-governor (standard historiography: Mori Motonori, 毛利元徳). Glyph is verbatim 雄. This is the SOLE 知事; the next name down the same column, 毛利元潔, is the first 大参事 (see issue).
Chōshū 知事 name 毛利元雄
大參事 二人
大参事（だいさんじ）二人
Senior Councillor (dai-sanji) -- 2 persons. The two appointees, read in column order, are 毛利元潔 (lower register of column 1) then 杉孫七郎 (upper register of column 2).
Chōshū 大参事 (count)
毛利元潔・杉孫七郎
毛利元潔（もうり もときよ）・杉孫七郎（すぎ まごしちろう）の二名
The two Senior Councillors (dai-sanji): Mori Motokiyo (毛利元潔, the lower-register name in column 1, immediately under governor Mori Motoo) and Sugi Magoshichiro (杉孫七郎, top of column 2).
Chōshū 大参事 names (2)
權大參事 五人
権大参事（ごんだいさんじ）五人
Provisional Senior Councillor (gon-dai-sanji) -- 5 persons. In column-flow order: 中村誠一, 國貞直人, 野村右仲, 木梨平之進, 宍戸陽之進.
Chōshū 権大参事 (count)
中村誠一・國貞直人・野村右仲・木梨平之進・宍戸陽之進
中村誠一（なかむら せいいち）・国貞直人（くにさだ なおと）・野村右仲（のむら うちゅう）・木梨平之進（きなし へいのしん）・宍戸陽之進（ししど ようのしん）の五名

The five Provisional Senior Councillors (gon-dai-sanji): Nakamura Seiichi (col-2 lower), Kunisada Naoto (col-3 upper), Nomura Uchu (col-3 lower), Kinashi Heinoshin (col-4 upper; col-4 has no lower name), and Shishido Yonoshin (col-5 upper). 小幡彦七 is NOT here -- it is the first 少参事.
Chōshū 権大参事 names (5)
少參事 七人
少参事（しょうさんじ）七人
Junior Councillor (sho-sanji) -- 7 persons. The seven names run from column-5 lower leftward through the 少参事列 continuation column.
Chōshū 少参事 (count)
小幡彦七・椙原治人・山縣彌八・久保松太郎・栢村數馬・天野順太郎
小幡彦七（おばた ひこしち）・椙原治人（すぎはら はると）・山県弥八（やまがた やはち）・久保松太郎（くぼ まつたろう）・栢村数馬（かしわむら かずま）・天野順太郎（あまの じゅんたろう）

Junior Councillors (sho-sanji), main block (col-5 lower through col-8 upper): Obata Hikoshichi, Sugihara Haruto, Yamagata Yahachi, Kubo Matsutaro, Kashiwamura Kazuma (栢村數馬), and Amano Juntaro (col-8 has no lower name). There is no '椙村數馬' on the page -- that was a misread fusion of 山縣彌八 and 栢村數馬.
Chōshū 少参事 names (block A)
少參事列
少参事列（しょうさんじ れつ）— 少参事の続き
'Junior Councillors, continued' -- the far-left continuation heading over the overflow column (column 9) where the last sho-sanji names are listed.
Chōshū 少参事列 (continued heading)
林良輔・高杉小忠太
林良輔（はやし りょうすけ）・高杉小忠太（たかすぎ ことた）の二名

The 少参事列 (continued Junior Councillors) column: Hayashi Ryosuke (upper) over Takasugi Kotota (lower). Takasugi Kotota was a Choshu samurai related to Takasugi Shinsaku. 天野順太郎 is NOT here -- it is in the main block (column 8 upper).
Chōshū 少参事列 names (block B)
